ddls:
CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each facility */,
  "facility_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare facility */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the facility */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the facility */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region where the facility is located */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds in the facility */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Contact information for emergencies */,
  "facility_type" TEXT /* Type of facility (e.g., Hospital, Clinic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facilities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bed_types" (
  "bed_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bed type */,
  "bed_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the bed type (e.g., ICU, Medical/Surgical) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the bed type */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of patients that can be accommodated in this bed type */,
  "special_requirements" TEXT /* Special requirements for this bed type (e.g., specialized equipment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bed_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bed availability record */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility */,
  "bed_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bed type */,
  "occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of occupied beds of this type */,
  "available_beds" INTEGER /* Number of available beds of this type */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to bed availability */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds of this type in the facility */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_availability_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_availability_bed_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bed_type_id") REFERENCES bed_types ("bed_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_admissions" (
  "admission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient admission */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the patient is admitted */,
  "bed_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bed type occupied by the patient */,
  "admission_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was admitted */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was discharged */,
  "bed_number" TEXT /* Specific bed number assigned to the patient */,
  "admitted_by" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member who admitted the patient */,
  "admission_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the admission process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_admissions_bed_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("bed_type_id") REFERENCES bed_types ("bed_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_admissions_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_admissions_admitted_by FOREIGN KEY ("admitted_by") REFERENCES facility_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_admissions_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition of the patient */,
  "insurance_info" TEXT /* Insurance information of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Home address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient or their emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility where the staff member works */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member at the facility */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department in which the staff member works */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the staff member */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the staff member's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_staff_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bed_transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bed transfer */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient being transferred */,
  "from_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility from which the patient is transferred */,
  "to_facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility to which the patient is transferred */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the bed transfer */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the bed transfer */,
  "transferred_by" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member who authorized the transfer */,
  "transfer_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the transfer process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_transfers_from_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("from_facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_transfers_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_transfers_transferred_by FOREIGN KEY ("transferred_by") REFERENCES facility_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bed_transfers_to_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("to_facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facility_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "facility_id" INTEGER /* ID of the facility that generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "prepared_by" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the staff member who prepared the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Bed Availability, Surge Capacity) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reports_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_facility_reports_prepared_by FOREIGN KEY ("prepared_by") REFERENCES facility_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Nurse) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for login */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Role ID of the user */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Staff ID of the user (if applicable) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES facility_staff ("staff_id")
)
